channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Vance heads back to the U.S. without striking a deal with Iran to bring an end to the war
item.description: Two American warships transited through the Strait of Hormuz for the first time since the start of the conflict.

item.title: Berkshire electric utility's court win could save it billions
item.description: PacifiCorp court win could reduce wildfire damages by $1 billion or more.

item.title: How Kodak is trying to turn around its business after teetering on bankruptcy
item.description: Photography company Eastman Kodak has seen its fair share of financial struggles, but CEO Jim Continenza is determined to fuel its success.

item.title: Vibe check from inside one of AI industry's main events: 'Claude mania'
item.description: At the HumanX conference in San Francisco this week, Anthropic's momentum was on everyone's lips.

item.title: How bond market's private credit crisis fears are playing out in fixed-income ETFs
item.description: Fears of a private credit crisis arrived just as the growing and less transparent bond market was being included in more fixed-income ETFs.

item.title: U.S. oil slips below $100 as Trump demands reopening of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday warned Iran to "stop now" if it was charging tankers to transit the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump's 250-foot 'triumphal arch' would loom over Potomac, new renderings show
item.description: Rep. Don Beyer said "President Trump is focused on a taxpayer-funded vanity project that would choke traffic, block our skyline, and tower over sacred ground."

item.title: Trump praises Palantir as stock has worst week in over a year and Iran conflict drags on
item.description: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.

item.title: Social Security 2027 cost-of-living adjustment estimate rises with gas prices
item.description: New government data shows the pace of inflation has increased, pushing up one estimate for the Social Security cost-of-living adjustment for 2027.

item.title: Man arrested after Sam Altman's house hit with Molotov cocktail, OpenAI headquarters threatened
item.description: Police arrested a suspect at OpenAI's headquarters for allegedly threatening arson after an attack on CEO Sam Altman's home.

item.title: Battles brew over in-state tuition for undocumented students
item.description: In some states, undocumented students have access to in-state college tuition if they meet certain requirements. Now, many of those laws are being challenged.

item.title: Trump policies, China's biotech boom are ending Europe's pharma powerhouse era
item.description: Companies have long lamented Europe's fragmented capital markets, single-market adoption on pricing and clinical trials, and uneven reimbursement policies.

item.title: Here's the inflation breakdown for March 2026 — in one chart
item.description: The Iran war has pushed up gasoline, airline fares and other prices for consumers.

item.title: Stocks gain on Iran ceasefire, plus 3 more things that drove last week's market
item.description: Although the market rally cooled on Friday, the S&P 500 still ended the week 3.6% higher.

item.title: How to help kids form healthy relationships with money: They 'end up in much better financial shape' as adults, psychologist says
item.description: Amid rising costs and a tighter economic climate, more parents are teaching their kids financial literacy lessons that could serve them well later in life.

item.title: A mom and tech entrepreneur building AI advocate for rare-disease families like hers
item.description: AI-powered healthcare startup Citizen Health is using the technology to focus on rare disease, helping manage patient lives as well as advance treatments.

item.title: Elon Musk’s xAI faces fresh opposition after landing permit for Mississippi power plant
item.description: Musk's xAI, now owned by SpaceX, faces a legal challenge from environmental groups opposed to a massive power plant in Mississippi.

item.title: Consumer sentiment hits record low, inflation fears rise amid Iran war
item.description: The university's headline index of consumer sentiment tumbled to 47.6, down 10.7% from March to its lowest on record.

item.title: Eli Lilly market share drops, Novo Nordisk holds firm as generic weight-loss drugs flood India
item.description: Eli Lilly loses share in India’s GLP‑1 market as cheap semaglutide generics surge, while Novo holds steady after deep price cuts to defend Ozempic, Wegovy.

item.title: Vance, Bessent questioned tech giants on AI security before Anthropic's Mythos release
item.description: Bessent and Fed Chair Jerome Powell separately met with the heads of the biggest U.S. banks to address the potential cyber threat of Anthropic's Mythos.

item.title: Ireland gridlocked by fuel protests as Iran war drives prices higher
item.description: Protestors are taking issue with the government's response to the spike in fuel prices since the onset of the Iran war.

item.title: Michael Burry says he's still betting against Palantir after Trump post boosts stock
item.description: The investor of the "Big Short" fame said he continues to hold long-dated put options on the artificial intelligence software firm.

item.title: Jeffrey Epstein victims will get House committee hearing, James Comer says
item.description: Rep. James Comer's promise came a day after first lady Melania Trump urged Congress to give victims of Jeffrey Epstein a public hearing so "we have the truth."

item.title: Former Sen. Ben Sasse shines the spotlight on a possible breakthrough for pancreatic cancer
item.description: Former Sen. Ben Sasse is taking Revolution Medicines' daraxonrasib, which has shown promise as a treatment for pancreatic cancer.

item.title: Cramer warns of ‘incredibly overconfident’ market after U.S.-Iran ceasefire
item.description: "The idea that everything will finally go right in the Middle East seems like a real stretch to me," Cramer said.

item.title: Powell, Bessent discussed Anthropic's Mythos AI cyber threat with major U.S. banks
item.description: Anthropic rolled out the new Mythos AI model to a select group of companies over concerns that hackers could exploit its capabilities.

item.title: Keir Starmer: 'I'm fed up' with Trump and Putin affecting UK energy costs
item.description: Iran has effectively closed the Strait of Hormuz in the war with the U.S. and Israel, creating an oil supply crunch and sending global energy prices soaring.

item.title: Average tax refund is 11% higher, latest IRS filing data shows
item.description: The average tax refund is about 11% higher so far this season, compared with about the same period in 2025, according to IRS filing data.

item.title: CoreWeave stock pops 11% on deal to power Anthropic's Claude
item.description: The deal comes one day after Meta committed an additional $21 billion in spending to the cloud provider as AI demand continues to soar.

item.title: Consumer prices rose 3.3% in March, as energy prices spiked due to Iran conflict
item.description: The consumer price index was expected to show a 3.3% year-over-year gain in March, according to the Dow Jones consensus.
